texto: I literally used to stare at my face in the mirror with hate and anger. I'd focus on those gigantic zits and just wail about what a monster I was, how I would never have a career because of my gross skin. I couldn't pass a mirror with out thinking about how hideous my skin was and how I wished I was someone else, someone with perfect skin.

texto: The amount of coordination it takes to shoot a television show is mind-numbing. There are so many things that have to be exactly right to create the correct environment for a single shot, let alone a whole scene or the full episode.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stephanie Beatriz sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “The amount of coordination it takes to shoot a television show is mind-numbing.
